channel.title: Ai on Will Hea
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Will Hea

item.title: Portable Prompts and AI Settings
item.description: Use a git repo to sync skills and preferences across devices and tools.

item.title: Why I Cancelled Claude Code
item.description: I cancelled my Claude Code Max subscription. Here’s what I want from a coding harness, why I’m leaving Claude for now, and what I’ll try next.

item.title: Working Differently with AI
item.description: How Claude Code changed my daily work from documents and spreadsheets to terminals and Python. New habits around testing, documentation, security, and tooling that come from working alongside AI agents every day.
